name: Corbita
description: Common cargo hauler. Broad-beamed, square-rigged, built for volume. Slow but steady.

name: Actuaria
description: Fast courier with oars and sails. Light cargo, high speed. The only safe way to move Phoenix-class goods.

name: Ponto
description: Large asymmetric vessel with two masts. More capacity than an Actuaria, faster than a Corbita. A compromise.
